column1: # IGNORE = reviewed and accepted (scanner/bundle noise, or inherent to the app
# design). Everything else keeps its default threshold and FAILS the build
# (see the dast job in .github/workflows/tests.yml). Re-review on app changes.
# --- Accepted: inherent to this app's design --------------------------------
# The server address is entered at runtime on the login screen (any host, http
# or https, ws or wss) and media/avatars come from the API + third parties, so
# connect-src/img-src/media-src are deliberately scheme-broad. script-src stays
# 'self'. Tightening these would break the product.

column3: CSP Wildcard Directive (connect/img/media broad by design)

column1: # COEP require-corp would block cross-origin media (uploads, GIF search) that do
# not send CORP; not applicable to this app's threat model.
# Public static SPA assets (no server-rendered secrets): caching is desirable.
